title: Blackspur BB-SD250 Screwdriver Set with Rack
features: Set includes 3x cross point and 3x slotted tips screwdrivers
Comes in a plastic hanging rack for easy row access
description: Blackspur screwdriver set includes 3x cross point and 3x slotted tips screwdrivers. Heat treated carbon steel blades. Comes in a plastic hanging rack for easy access. Packed in double blister. Slotted tips include sizes: 3" x 4mm, 4" x 5mm and 6" x 5mm. Cross point tips include sizes: 3" x 0, 4" x 1 and 6" x 1. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK.
